PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -p12345678 clinic_db -e "UPDATE users SET is_active = 1 WHERE username = 'admin'; SELECT id, username, role, is_active FROM users;" 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "Warning" })
